latestIgtvVideos.title: Episode 1: How to Clean the 🚽
latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Welcome to Episode 1 of @nowitsclean Kids starring  my nephew Tristan. In this episode, Tristan learns how to clean the toilet 🚽. 
.
We reviewed the importance of wearing gloves, reasons why we shouldn’t mix chemicals and I demonstrated some techniques to getting the clean done quickly and correctly. I used the ‘I do’, ‘we do’ and ‘you do’ teaching methodologies. 
.
Products used: Ecolab cleaner (only available for commercial clients), Clorox Toilet wand and old cleaning rags. 
.
Have you taught your kids how to clean the toilet? What age do you think is a good age to start?
.
#cleanhouse #instaclean #homecleaning #cleaningmotivation #cleaningtipsandtricks #toilets #bathroomcleaning #teachingkids #cleaningaccount #cleaninghouse #cleaningtips #cleaningobsessed #cleaningproducts #cleaning

latestIgtvVideos.title: Clean With Me LIVE - Bathroom (Replay)
latestIgtvVideos.caption: If you didn’t get a chance to watch me @nowitsclean and @athomewithisabelle LIVE - here’s the replay. We shared bathroom cleaning tips, product + tool recommendations and did tub and shower cleaning demonstrations.

latestPosts.caption:
Let me tell you something—engagement moons do NOT get enough love. They are so underrated, because they are 1000% worth it. Also? Not telling everyone you’re engaged right away? Flex.
My fiancé and I somehow found a last-minute suite on a sold-out 12-night Panama Canal cruise and took off to celebrate. We ate, laughed, explored, and just soaked up this next chapter together.
I know I don’t usually share this part of my life, and honestly, I was hesitant—but this is a BIG deal. I’m going to be a wife (!!), and that’s huge. Trust, this won’t be my whole identity, but I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t deep in my feels about it.
So yeah, I’ll share more about my journey to ‘I do.’ But an engagement party? Probably not. Because this? This was special.
#Engaged #Engagement #BrideToBe #2025Bride #Cruise #Wedding #weddingplanning #couples #2025wedding #bride

latestPosts.caption:
Allow me to (re)introduce myself. hi my name is Lori. Welcome to the last 3 years of my life. Here’s what you’ve missed and what you can expect. #Cleantok #cleanfluencer #BehindTheScenes #homerenovations #contentcreator
.
While my life certainly never turned out the way I expected,  I feel blessed to be exactly where I am. Remember it’s never too late to completely reinvent yourself. 
.
Are you currently living your dream life ✨?

latestPosts.caption:
Lori’s Getting Married | Episode 9: A Walk to Remember - Finale 🥂🇯🇲

Yay! It’s official—Lori is Married! Thank you for taking this journey with me as I shared my experience—the imperfect parts, the wedding stress, and the magical moments.

To our incredible wedding team, our family, and our friends who traveled from near and far to witness us exchange our vows in Ocho Rios, Jamaica—thank you! When I said I wanted to execute a full wedding in a 7-hour port window, people thought I was crazy. But we did it. Even with a cold front and a 1.5-hour rain delay on our wedding day, God made a way.

I am living proof that if your life hasn’t unfolded the way you imagined, the things you hoped for can still happen—maybe just a little later than expected, but right when they’re meant to.

Even though this is the end of the Lori’s Getting Married series, I still have so much to share. What questions can I answer for you, and what more do you want to see? 🤍✨

The Team:
Wedding Planner: @theweddingplannerplus
Venue: @bayvistaja
Makeup: @dolce_beaute
Hair: @dae_glamz
Photographer: @emaniphotographyjamaica
Videography: @vividpixxweddingcorp 

#lorisgettingmarried #2026bride #jamaicawedding #destinationwedding #visitjamaica #cruisewedding #weddingtokwaaaaa

taggedUsers.full_name: Bridal Makeup Artist in Ocho Rios Jamaica| Francesca

latestPosts.caption:
Our collective thoughts and prayers worked. Thank you God! Despite rough seas, which fortunately calmed, we docked in Ocho Rios, Jamaica.

The groom and I headed straight to @bayvistaja where our wedding planner, Michelle Phillips @theweddingplannerplus greeted us with rum punches. We toured the property and did a quick rehearsal while our videographer @vividpixxweddingcorp captured every moment. Pssst, coming soon to Y T.

My glam team Francesca @dolce_beaute on makeup and Shadae @daeglamzbridal with the Hollywood curls prepped me for bridal portraits with Christopher @emaniphotographyjamaica. This day is a total whirlwind!

#lorisgettingmarried #jamaica #destinationwedding #2026bride #jamaicawedding

taggedUsers.full_name: Bridal Makeup Artist in Ocho Rios Jamaica| Francesca

latestPosts.caption:
Lori’s Getting Married Episode 8: Getting Hitched in Jamaica

I’ve been saying this wedding is a gamble, and now you finally know why.

We aren't just getting married on a cruise - we’re trying to pull off a full wedding during a 7-hour port stop in Ocho Rios. The logistics are insane. I have to get 22 guests off the ship and to @bayvistaja villa, where they’ll join 18 guests for our intimate 40-person ceremony.

Everything you would normally do at a wedding—the glam, ceremony, signing, cocktail hour, photos, a 3-course reception and dancing - has to happen before All Aboard at 3:30 PM. If we aren't back by then, the ship leaves us at 4:00 PM. And with how horrible the weather has been this trip, I’m just sitting here nervous... is this wedding even going to happen?

Our Wedding Team:
Wedding Planner: @theweddingplannerplus
Venue: @bayvistaja
Photographer: @emaniphotographyjamaica

#lorisgettingmarried#destinationwedding #2026wedding #2026bride #visitjamaica #cruisewedding #ochorios #jamaicawedding

As a bride, would you be upset if your future husband saw your wedding dress before the ceremony? 

Here’s what happened: I sent my wedding dresses and my future husband’s suits to be steamed on the ship. I specifically asked them to return my dress in the dust bag, but they brought it back completely open on the hanger.

My fiancé was the one who opened the door, and there it was - along with anyone else in the hallway who happened to pass by. I am upset. He had told me several times he wanted to be surprised, and I was actually leading him to believe I was wearing a totally different style he doesn't even like. I wanted that "oh my god" moment, and now it feels like that surprise was taken away.

Between missing our port and now this, the night before the wedding is off to a bumpy start. 

#lorisgettingmarried #weddingdress #weddingdisaster #cruisewedding #2026bride #destinationwedding

Episode 7: Lori’s Getting Married - All Aboard
SURPRISE! We’re officially getting married on a cruise. I’ve been holding this secret in for so long - I’m actually shocked more of you didn’t guess. 
I won’t sugarcoat it: getting all things for a destination wedding onto a cruise ship is not for the weak. If you’re planning your own destination wedding, take this as your sign and get help!
Seeing all of our guests who have flown in from the UK, Canada, Jamaica and parts of the US at the All White Welcome party was great. Everyone got the meet and connect. We handed out the VIP Welcome Bags with their itineraries and thank-you notes - I think they liked it.
Most of our guests have never cruised before, so this should be an interesting week. I’ll put the camera down now, relax into cruise life and celebrate with our guests.

#lorisgettingmarried #cruisewedding #destinationwedding #2026bride #2026wedding #cruising

Episode 6: Lori’s Getting Married - Wedding Welcome Bags

Sharing a sneak peek of our VIP Wedding Welcome Bags. Curating these gifts has been fun and I really hope our guests enjoy them! I am also so proud of these cavas totes that I designed using @googlegemini. I’ll show you the design and share the vendor I used on Alibaba who manufactured them for us when I get back from our wedding and honeymoon. 

#lorisgettingmarried #2026bride #2026wedding #destinationwedding #weddingwelcomebags

Episode 4: Lori’s Getting Married - Broke and Can’t Fix - Listen I’m not trying to have all these last minute problems snowball out of control, because seriously we do not have the time for that. Even though I ran into a snafu with my @cricut (I’m not even sure what happened) - I’m so happy we were able to get a new one and were able to customize all the things.
#lorisgettingmarried #2026bride #2026wedding #destinationwedding #cricut #weddingtok

Episode 4: Lori’s Getting Married - The Ring Doesn’t Fit
Panic mode activated. What do you do in this situation - we’re two days out? Fortunately, we did get to handle a lot of other tasks that were on our to-do list today. I run a tight ship, even through I dropped the ball on his wedding band.
#lorisgettingmarried #2026bride #2026wedding #destinationwedding #weddingrings

Finally with my Mr. 🥰😍
The realities of long distance love…so excited to go on this journey with you baby. ❤️

#ldr #2026bride #2026wedding #destinationwedding #lorisgettingmarried

Episode 3: Lori’s Getting Married - Reunited and it feels so goo

It’s go time baby! Early morning flights, car rentals, hotel check-ins and finally being reunited with my guy! Love overdue and so worth it. 
Anyhow, we have so much to do tomorrow - make sure to lock in, engage with this post so you can see what happens next. 

#lorisgettingmarried #2026bride #2026wedding #destinationwedding #lorisgettingmarried
